toast.source: 'The Brewhouse Santa Barbara - 229 West Montecito Street - Saturday, June 27' Daily Performance Summary. Freshest Toast at the Mon Jun 29 4 AM run (Sun Jun 28 summary not yet delivered).
toast.note: Sat Jun 27 daily summary (single location, 229 W Montecito). Net $9,160.20 (+14.4% vs same-day-last-week Sat Jun 20 $8,007.80, +1.0% vs 4-wk avg $9,065.70). Gross $9,638.05 (+14.9% vs SDLW $8,391.15). 333 guests, 226 orders, avg/guest $27.51, avg/order $40.53. Labor 20.3% of net ($1,862.49). Discounts $477.85 (~5.0%), Comps $50.00, Voids $150.50 (down from $297.45 SDLW). Strong Saturday. Sun Jun 28 summary not yet delivered at the 4 AM run.
